title: Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
description: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now.

title: Anthropic tested removing Claude Code from the Pro plan
description: Untenable demand has Anthropic exploring new approaches to rationing its service.

title: 5 AI Models Tried to Scam Me. Some of Them Were Scary Good
description: The cyber capabilities of AI models have experts rattled. AI’s social skills may be just as dangerous.

title: Coyote vs. Acme is finally getting released—with a killer trailer
description: What was Warner Bros. even thinking, shelving this film for so many years?

title: Google turns Chrome into an AI co-worker for the workplace
description: Google brings Gemini-powered "auto browse" capabilities to Chrome for enterprise users, letting workers automate tasks like research, data entry, and more.

title: Google unveils two new TPUs designed for the "agentic era"
description: Google's new generation of Tensor AI chips is actually two chips, one for inference and one for training.

title: Google makes an interesting choice with its new agent-building tool for enterprises
description: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform takes an interesting approach: It is geared for IT and technical users.

title: Tabloid reports linking 10 missing and dead scientists spur FBI probe
description: FBI suspects foreign spies may be targeting scientists with access to government secrets.

title: AI Overviews are coming to your Gmail at work
description: The AI Overviews will offer instant summaries pulled from across multiple emails.

title: AI Tools Are Helping Mediocre North Korean Hackers Steal Millions
description: One group of hackers used AI for everything from vibe coding their malware to creating fake company websites—and stole as much as $12 million in three months.

title: Physicists think they've solved the muon mystery
description: Results dash hopes for a fifth force but provide very precise proof of Standard Model and QFT.

title: OpenAI teams up with Infosys to bring AI tools to more businesses
description: Infosys said the integration will be used to help its clients modernize software development, automate workflows, and deploy AI systems, initially focusing software engineering, legacy modernization, and DevOps.

title: The Download: introducing the 10 Things That Matter in AI Right Now
description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. title: AI needs a strong data fabric to deliver business value
description: Artificial intelligence is moving quickly in the enterprise, from experimentation to everyday use. Organizations are deploying copilots, agents, and predictive systems across finance, supply chains, human resources, and customer operations. title: 3 things Michelle Kim is into right now
description: Isegye Idol If you thought K-pop was weird, virtual idols—humans who perform as anime-style digital characters via motion capture—will blow your mind. title: One town’s scheme to get rid of its geese
description: “Pull over!” I order my brother one sunny February afternoon. Our target is in sight: a gaggle of Canada geese, pecking at grass near the dog park. title: There is no nature anymore
description: When people talk about “nature,” they’re generally talking about things that aren’t made by human beings. Rocks. Reefs. Red wolves. title: Join Our Livestream: Musk v. Altman and the Future of OpenAI
description: On May 8, we’re going live to answer your questions about the Musk v. Altman trial that could determine the fate of OpenAI.

title: The Pope’s Warnings About AI Were AI-Generated, a Detection Tool Claims
description: Pangram Labs’ updated Chrome extension puts warning labels on AI slop as you scroll your social feeds.

title: OpenAI Beefs Up ChatGPT’s Image Generation Model
description: The ChatGPT Images 2.0 model is here. Our testing shows it’s better at creating more detailed images and rendering text, but it still struggles with languages other than English.

title: Understanding Convolutions on Graphs
description: Understanding the building blocks and design choices of graph neural networks.

title: A Gentle Introduction to Graph Neural Networks
description: What components are needed for building learning algorithms that leverage the structure and properties of graphs?

title: Distill Hiatus
description: After five years, Distill will be taking a break.

title: Adversarial Reprogramming of Neural Cellular Automata
description: Reprogramming Neural CA to exhibit novel behaviour, using adversarial attacks.

title: Weight Banding
description: Weights in the final layer of common visual models appear as horizontal bands. We investigate how and why.
